pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh hardcoded OUTPUT_PATH
Task description strictly mandates '4 tangent constraints total'
Task description mandates left pulley radius to 50 mm
Task description mandates right pulley radius to 25 mm
Task description mandates distance between centers exactly 250 mm
Task description mandates extrusion depth to 15 mm

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for solvespace_env pulley_belt_envelope_layout task by confirming that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new SolveSpace 3D model from scratch. Verified the expected output path (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/belt_envelope.slvs), the 4 required tangent constraints, the radiuses (50, 25), distance (250), and extrusion depth (15) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
